## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Type-check clean (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Smoke test passes (`pnpm smoke`)
- [ ] A changeset is included if this affects published behavior (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] No `TODO`/`FIXME`/placeholder markers in the diff
